query:
You are working on the thunderbird/thunderbird-android repository.
The codebase is at version 10.0 (commit: 4a30419e).

## Issue to Resolve

Always mark read when archiving email messages
### Checklist

- [X] I have used the search function to see if someone else has already submitted the same feature request.
- [X] I will describe the problem with as much detail as possible.
- [X] This issue only contains a request for one single feature, **not** multiple (related) features.

### App version

6.804

### Problem you are trying to solve

I'd love some way to mark things as read when archiving.

Generally, when archiving something unread, it's because I have sufficient information from the subject line/already roughly know the contents - or know I don't care too much about it, but still want it "just in case". I like being able to filter by unread though, especially if it's something I want to get back to later and refile - but don't want in my inbox because it's not really a priority. 

### Suggested solution

An option to mark things read when archiving, like what's done with spam, would be great. Alternatively I think it'd be similarly nice to have one of the possible swipe actions be "mark as read and archive" together.

### Screenshots / Drawings / Technical details

_No response_

## Additional Context from Issue Discussion

Honestly I think this should be the default. I can't think of a use case to archive a message and not also mark it read.

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `legacy/core/build.gradle.kts`
- `legacy/core/src/main/java/com/fsck/k9/controller/ArchiveOperations.kt`
- `legacy/core/src/main/java/com/fsck/k9/controller/KoinModule.kt`
- `legacy/core/src/main/java/com/fsck/k9/controller/MessagingController.java`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

## Important Evaluation Notes

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

527→        get() {
528→            val age = maximumPolledMessageAge.takeIf { it >= 0 } ?: return null
529→
530→            val now = Calendar.getInstance()
531→            now[Calendar.HOUR_OF_DAY] = 0
532→            now[Calendar.MINUTE] = 0
533→            now[Calendar.SECOND] = 0
534→            now[Calendar.MILLISECOND] = 0
535→
536→            if (age < 28) {
537→                now.add(Calendar.DATE, age * -1)
538→            } else {
539→                when (age) {
540→                    28 -> now.add(Calendar.MONTH, -1)
541→                    56 -> now.add(Calendar.MONTH, -2)
542→                    84 -> now.add(Calendar.MONTH, -3)
543→                    168 -> now.add(Calendar.MONTH, -6)
544→                    365 -> now.add(Calendar.YEAR, -1)
545→                }
546→            }
547→
548→            return now.time

 32→    /**
 33→     * Name of the [SharedPreferences] file used to store the last known version of the
 34→     * accounts' databases.
 35→     *
 36→     * See `UpgradeDatabases` for a detailed explanation of the database upgrade process.
 37→     */
 38→    private const val DATABASE_VERSION_CACHE = "database_version_cache"
 39→
 40→    /**
 41→     * Key used to store the last known database version of the accounts' databases.
 42→     *
 43→     * @see DATABASE_VERSION_CACHE
 44→     */
 45→    private const val KEY_LAST_ACCOUNT_DATABASE_VERSION = "last_account_database_version"
 46→
 47→    /**
 48→     * A reference to the [SharedPreferences] used for caching the last known database version.
 49→     *
 50→     * @see checkCachedDatabaseVersion
 51→     * @see setDatabasesUpToDate
 52→     */
 53→    private var databaseVersionCache: SharedPreferences? = null
 54→
 55→    /**
 56→     * @see areDatabasesUpToDate
 57→     */
 58→    private var databasesUpToDate = false
 59→
 60→    /**
 61→     * Check if we already know whether all databases are using the current database schema.
 62→     *
 63→     * This method is only used for optimizations. If it returns `true` we can be certain that getting a [LocalStore]
 64→     * instance won't trigger a schema upgrade.
 65→     *
 66→     * @return `true`, if we know that all databases are using the current database schema. `false`, otherwise.
 67→     */
 68→    @Synchronized
 69→    @JvmStatic
 70→    fun areDatabasesUpToDate(): Boolean {
 71→        return databasesUpToDate
 72→    }
 73→
 74→    /**
 75→     * Remember that all account databases are using the most recent database schema.
 76→     *
 77→     * @param save
 78→     * Whether or not to write the current database version to the
 79→     * `SharedPreferences` [.DATABASE_VERSION_CACHE].
 80→     *
 81→     * @see .areDatabasesUpToDate
 82→     */
 83→    @Synchronized
 84→    @JvmStatic
 85→    fun setDatabasesUpToDate(save: Boolean) {
 86→        databasesUpToDate = true
 87→
 88→        if (save) {
 89→            val editor = databaseVersionCache!!.edit()
 90→            editor.putInt(KEY_LAST_ACCOUNT_DATABASE_VERSION, LocalStore.getDbVersion())
 91→            editor.apply()
 92→        }
 93→    }
 94→
 95→    /**
 96→     * Loads the last known database version of the accounts' databases from a `SharedPreference`.
 97→     *
 98→     * If the stored version matches [LocalStore.getDbVersion] we know that the databases are up to date.
 99→     * Using `SharedPreferences` should be a lot faster than opening all SQLite databases to get the current database
100→     * version.
101→     *
102→     * See the class `UpgradeDatabases` for a detailed explanation of the database upgrade process.
103→     *
104→     * @see areDatabasesUpToDate
105→     */
106→    private fun checkCachedDatabaseVersion(context: Context) {
107→        databaseVersionCache = context.getSharedPreferences(DATABASE_VERSION_CACHE, Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
108→
109→        val cachedVersion = databaseVersionCache!!.getInt(KEY_LAST_ACCOUNT_DATABASE_VERSION, 0)
110→
111→        if (cachedVersion >= LocalStore.getDbVersion()) {
112→            setDatabasesUpToDate(false)
113→        }
114→    }

497→    private inline fun <reified T : Enum<T>> Storage.getEnum(key: String, defaultValue: T): T {
498→        return try {
499→            val value = getString(key, null)
500→            if (value != null) {
501→                enumValueOf(value)
502→            } else {
503→                defaultValue
504→            }
505→        } catch (e: Exception) {
506→            Timber.e("Couldn't read setting '%s'. Using default value instead.", key)
507→            defaultValue
508→        }
509→    }

209→    @Synchronized
210→    private fun loadIdentities(accountUuid: String, storage: Storage): List<Identity> {
211→        val newIdentities = ArrayList<Identity>()
212→        var ident = 0
213→        var gotOne: Boolean
214→        do {
215→            gotOne = false
216→            val name = storage.getString("$accountUuid.$IDENTITY_NAME_KEY.$ident", null)
217→            val email = storage.getString("$accountUuid.$IDENTITY_EMAIL_KEY.$ident", null)
218→            val signatureUse = storage.getBoolean("$accountUuid.signatureUse.$ident", false)
219→            val signature = storage.getString("$accountUuid.signature.$ident", null)
220→            val description = storage.getString("$accountUuid.$IDENTITY_DESCRIPTION_KEY.$ident", null)
221→            val replyTo = storage.getString("$accountUuid.replyTo.$ident", null)
222→            if (email != null) {
223→                val identity = Identity(
224→                    name = name,
225→                    email = email,
226→                    signatureUse = signatureUse,
227→                    signature = signature,
228→                    description = description,
229→                    replyTo = replyTo,
230→                )
231→                newIdentities.add(identity)
232→                gotOne = true
233→            }
234→            ident++
235→        } while (gotOne)
236→
237→        if (newIdentities.isEmpty()) {
238→            val name = storage.getString("$accountUuid.name", null)
239→            val email = storage.getString("$accountUuid.email", null)
240→            val signatureUse = storage.getBoolean("$accountUuid.signatureUse", false)
241→            val signature = storage.getString("$accountUuid.signature", null)
242→            val identity = Identity(
243→                name = name,
244→                email = email,
245→                signatureUse = signatureUse,
246→                signature = signature,
247→                description = email,
248→            )
249→            newIdentities.add(identity)
250→        }
251→
252→        return newIdentities
253→    }

255→    @Synchronized
256→    fun save(editor: StorageEditor, storage: Storage, account: Account) {
257→        val accountUuid = account.uuid
258→
259→        if (!storage.getString("accountUuids", "").contains(account.uuid)) {
260→            var accountUuids = storage.getString("accountUuids", "")
261→            accountUuids += (if (accountUuids.isNotEmpty()) "," else "") + account.uuid
262→            editor.putString("accountUuids", accountUuids)
263→        }
264→
265→        with(account) {
266→            editor.putString(
267→                "$accountUuid.$INCOMING_SERVER_SETTINGS_KEY",

369→    @Synchronized
370→    fun delete(editor: StorageEditor, storage: Storage, account: Account) {
371→        val accountUuid = account.uuid
372→
373→        // Get the list of account UUIDs
374→        val uuids =
375→            storage.getString("accountUuids", "").split(",".toRegex()).dropLastWhile { it.isEmpty() }.toTypedArray()
376→
377→        // Create a list of all account UUIDs excluding this account
378→        val newUuids = ArrayList<String>(uuids.size)
379→        for (uuid in uuids) {
380→            if (uuid != accountUuid) {
381→                newUuids.add(uuid)
382→            }
383→        }
384→
385→        // Only change the 'accountUuids' value if this account's UUID was listed before
386→        if (newUuids.size < uuids.size) {

486→    @Synchronized
487→    private fun saveIdentities(account: Account, storage: Storage, editor: StorageEditor) {
488→        deleteIdentities(account, storage, editor)
489→        var ident = 0
490→
491→        with(account) {
492→            for (identity in identities) {
493→                editor.putString("$uuid.$IDENTITY_NAME_KEY.$ident", identity.name)
494→                editor.putString("$uuid.$IDENTITY_EMAIL_KEY.$ident", identity.email)
495→                editor.putBoolean("$uuid.signatureUse.$ident", identity.signatureUse)
496→                editor.putString("$uuid.signature.$ident", identity.signature)
497→                editor.putString("$uuid.$IDENTITY_DESCRIPTION_KEY.$ident", identity.description)
498→                editor.putString("$uuid.replyTo.$ident", identity.replyTo)
499→                ident++
500→            }
501→        }
502→    }
503→
504→    @Synchronized
505→    private fun deleteIdentities(account: Account, storage: Storage, editor: StorageEditor) {
506→        val accountUuid = account.uuid
507→
508→        var identityIndex = 0
509→        var gotOne: Boolean
510→        do {
511→            gotOne = false
512→            val email = storage.getString("$accountUuid.$IDENTITY_EMAIL_KEY.$identityIndex", null)
513→            if (email != null) {
514→                editor.remove("$accountUuid.$IDENTITY_NAME_KEY.$identityIndex")
515→                editor.remove("$accountUuid.$IDENTITY_EMAIL_KEY.$identityIndex")
516→                editor.remove("$accountUuid.signatureUse.$identityIndex")
517→                editor.remove("$accountUuid.signature.$identityIndex")
518→                editor.remove("$accountUuid.$IDENTITY_DESCRIPTION_KEY.$identityIndex")
519→                editor.remove("$accountUuid.replyTo.$identityIndex")
520→                gotOne = true
521→            }
522→            identityIndex++
523→        } while (gotOne)
524→    }
525→
526→    fun move(editor: StorageEditor, account: Account, storage: Storage, newPosition: Int) {
527→        val accountUuids = storage.getString("accountUuids", "").split(",").filter { it.isNotEmpty() }
528→        val oldPosition = accountUuids.indexOf(account.uuid)
529→        if (oldPosition == -1 || oldPosition == newPosition) return
530→
531→        val newAccountUuidsString = accountUuids.toMutableList()
532→            .apply {
533→                removeAt(oldPosition)
534→                add(newPosition, account.uuid)
535→            }
536→            .joinToString(separator = ",")
537→
538→        editor.putString("accountUuids", newAccountUuidsString)
539→    }
540→
541→    private fun <T : Enum<T>> getEnumStringPref(storage: Storage, key: String, defaultEnum: T): T {
542→        val stringPref = storage.getString(key, null)
543→
544→        return if (stringPref == null) {
545→            defaultEnum
546→        } else {
547→            try {
548→                java.lang.Enum.valueOf<T>(defaultEnum.declaringJavaClass, stringPref)
549→            } catch (ex: IllegalArgumentException) {
550→                Timber.w(
551→                    ex,
552→                    "Unable to convert preference key [%s] value [%s] to enum of type %s",
553→                    key,
554→                    stringPref,
555→                    defaultEnum.declaringJavaClass,
556→                )
557→
558→                defaultEnum
559→            }
560→        }
561→    }

content.text:
I have implemented the requested feature to always mark email messages as read when they are archived, with an optional setting to control this behavior.

### Changes Made:

1.  **Account Model**:
    *   Added `isMarkMessageAsReadOnArchive` property to the `Account` class to store the user preference.
    *   Updated `AccountPreferenceSerializer` to ensure the new setting is correctly loaded, saved, and handled during account import/export.

2.  **Settings and UI**:
    *   Added a new `mark_message_as_read_on_archive` CheckBoxPreference to the Account Settings screen (under the "Incoming server" section, near the "Mark as read when deleted" option).
    *   Set the default value of this new setting to `true`, as suggested in the issue discussion.
    *   Added the necessary strings for the setting's label and summary in `strings.xml`.
    *   Updated `AccountSettingsDescriptions` to include the new setting and incremented the global `Settings.VERSION` to `102` to support the new preference version.
    *   Updated `AccountSettingsFragment` to hide this setting if the account's backend does not support moving messages.

3.  **Core Logic**:
    *   Updated `ArchiveOperations` to check the `isMarkMessageAsReadOnArchive` setting. If enabled, it now uses the `MOVE_AND_MARK_AS_READ` operation instead of a simple `MOVE`.
    *   Implemented the `MOVE_AND_MARK_AS_READ` operation in `MessagingController.moveOrCopyMessageSynchronous`. This ensures that messages moved to the archive folder (or any other folder using this operation) are immediately marked as read in the local database.
    *   The remote move operation already supported `MOVE_AND_MARK_AS_READ` in the backend (specifically for IMAP), so this change correctly synchronizes the state with the server.

These changes provide users with the expected behavior while maintaining flexibility through a new configuration option.

Co-Authored-By: Firebender <help@firebender.com>

 81→     * @see .areDatabasesUpToDate
 82→     */
 83→    @Synchronized
 84→    @JvmStatic
 85→    fun setDatabasesUpToDate(save: Boolean) {

 88→        if (save) {
 89→            val editor = databaseVersionCache!!.edit()

102→     * See the class `UpgradeDatabases` for a detailed explanation of the database upgrade process.
103→     *
104→     * @see areDatabasesUpToDate
105→     */
106→    private fun checkCachedDatabaseVersion(context: Context) {
107→        databaseVersionCache = context.getSharedPreferences(DATABASE_VERSION_CACHE, Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
108→
109→        val cachedVersion = databaseVersionCache!!.getInt(KEY_LAST_ACCOUNT_DATABASE_VERSION, 0)
110→
111→        if (cachedVersion >= LocalStore.getDbVersion()) {
112→            setDatabasesUpToDate(false)
113→        }
114→    }

503→                defaultValue
504→            }
505→        } catch (e: Exception) {

 27→class AccountPreferenceSerializer(
 28→    private val resourceProvider: CoreResourceProvider,
 29→    private val serverSettingsSerializer: ServerSettingsSerializer,
 30→) {
 31→
 32→    @Synchronized
 33→    fun loadAccount(account: Account, storage: Storage) {
 34→        val accountUuid = account.uuid
 35→        with(account) {
 36→            incomingServerSettings = serverSettingsSerializer.deserialize(
 37→                storage.getString("$accountUuid.$INCOMING_SERVER_SETTINGS_KEY", ""),
 38→            )
 39→            outgoingServerSettings = serverSettingsSerializer.deserialize(
 40→                storage.getString("$accountUuid.$OUTGOING_SERVER_SETTINGS_KEY", ""),
 41→            )
 42→            oAuthState = storage.getString("$accountUuid.oAuthState", null)
 43→            name = storage.getString("$accountUuid.description", null)
 44→            alwaysBcc = storage.getString("$accountUuid.alwaysBcc", alwaysBcc)
 45→            automaticCheckIntervalMinutes = storage.getInt(
 46→                "" +
 47→                    "$accountUuid.automaticCheckIntervalMinutes",

209→    @Synchronized
210→    private fun loadIdentities(accountUuid: String, storage: Storage): List<Identity> {
211→        val newIdentities = ArrayList<Identity>()
212→        var ident = 0
213→        var gotOne: Boolean
214→        do {
215→            gotOne = false
216→            val name = storage.getString("$accountUuid.$IDENTITY_NAME_KEY.$ident", null)
217→            val email = storage.getString("$accountUuid.$IDENTITY_EMAIL_KEY.$ident", null)
218→            val signatureUse = storage.getBoolean("$accountUuid.signatureUse.$ident", false)
219→            val signature = storage.getString("$accountUuid.signature.$ident", null)
220→            val description = storage.getString("$accountUuid.$IDENTITY_DESCRIPTION_KEY.$ident", null)
221→            val replyTo = storage.getString("$accountUuid.replyTo.$ident", null)
222→            if (email != null) {
223→                val identity = Identity(
224→                    name = name,
225→                    email = email,
226→                    signatureUse = signatureUse,
227→                    signature = signature,
228→                    description = description,
229→                    replyTo = replyTo,
230→                )
231→                newIdentities.add(identity)
232→                gotOne = true
233→            }
234→            ident++
235→        } while (gotOne)
236→
237→        if (newIdentities.isEmpty()) {
238→            val name = storage.getString("$accountUuid.name", null)
239→            val email = storage.getString("$accountUuid.email", null)
240→            val signatureUse = storage.getBoolean("$accountUuid.signatureUse", false)
241→            val signature = storage.getString("$accountUuid.signature", null)
242→            val identity = Identity(
243→                name = name,
244→                email = email,
245→                signatureUse = signatureUse,
246→                signature = signature,
247→                description = email,
248→            )
249→            newIdentities.add(identity)
250→        }
251→
252→        return newIdentities
253→    }

255→    @Synchronized
256→    fun save(editor: StorageEditor, storage: Storage, account: Account) {
257→        val accountUuid = account.uuid
258→
259→        if (!storage.getString("accountUuids", "").contains(account.uuid)) {
260→            var accountUuids = storage.getString("accountUuids", "")
261→            accountUuids += (if (accountUuids.isNotEmpty()) "," else "") + account.uuid
262→            editor.putString("accountUuids", accountUuids)
263→        }
264→
265→        with(account) {
266→            editor.putString(
267→                "$accountUuid.$INCOMING_SERVER_SETTINGS_KEY",
268→                serverSettingsSerializer.serialize(incomingServerSettings),
269→            )
270→            editor.putString(
271→                "$accountUuid.$OUTGOING_SERVER_SETTINGS_KEY",
272→                serverSettingsSerializer.serialize(outgoingServerSettings),
273→            )
274→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.oAuthState", oAuthState)
275→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.description", name)
276→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.alwaysBcc", alwaysBcc)
277→            editor.putInt("$accountUuid.automaticCheckIntervalMinutes", automaticCheckIntervalMinutes)
278→            editor.putInt("$accountUuid.idleRefreshMinutes", idleRefreshMinutes)
279→            editor.putInt("$accountUuid.displayCount", displayCount)
280→            editor.putBoolean("$accountUuid.notifyNewMail", isNotifyNewMail)
281→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.folderNotifyNewMailMode", folderNotifyNewMailMode.name)
282→            editor.putBoolean("$accountUuid.notifySelfNewMail", isNotifySelfNewMail)
283→            editor.putBoolean("$accountUuid.notifyContactsMailOnly", isNotifyContactsMailOnly)
284→            editor.putBoolean("$accountUuid.ignoreChatMessages", isIgnoreChatMessages)
285→            editor.putBoolean("$accountUuid.notifyMailCheck", isNotifySync)
286→            editor.putInt("$accountUuid.messagesNotificationChannelVersion", messagesNotificationChannelVersion)
287→            editor.putInt("$accountUuid.deletePolicy", deletePolicy.setting)
288→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.inboxFolderName", legacyInboxFolder)
289→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.draftsFolderName", importedDraftsFolder)
290→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.sentFolderName", importedSentFolder)
291→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.trashFolderName", importedTrashFolder)
292→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.archiveFolderName", importedArchiveFolder)
293→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.spamFolderName", importedSpamFolder)
294→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.inboxFolderId", inboxFolderId?.toString())
295→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.outboxFolderId", outboxFolderId?.toString())
296→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.draftsFolderId", draftsFolderId?.toString())
297→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.sentFolderId", sentFolderId?.toString())
298→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.trashFolderId", trashFolderId?.toString())
299→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.archiveFolderId", archiveFolderId?.toString())
300→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.spamFolderId", spamFolderId?.toString())
301→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.archiveFolderSelection", archiveFolderSelection.name)
302→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.draftsFolderSelection", draftsFolderSelection.name)
303→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.sentFolderSelection", sentFolderSelection.name)
304→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.spamFolderSelection", spamFolderSelection.name)
305→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.trashFolderSelection", trashFolderSelection.name)
306→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.autoExpandFolderName", importedAutoExpandFolder)
307→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.autoExpandFolderId", autoExpandFolderId?.toString())
308→            editor.putInt("$accountUuid.accountNumber", accountNumber)
309→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.sortTypeEnum", sortType.name)
310→            editor.putBoolean("$accountUuid.sortAscending", isSortAscending(sortType))
311→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.showPicturesEnum", showPictures.name)
312→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.folderDisplayMode", folderDisplayMode.name)
313→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.folderSyncMode", folderSyncMode.name)
314→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.folderPushMode", folderPushMode.name)
315→            editor.putBoolean("$accountUuid.signatureBeforeQuotedText", isSignatureBeforeQuotedText)
316→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.expungePolicy", expungePolicy.name)
317→            editor.putBoolean("$accountUuid.syncRemoteDeletions", isSyncRemoteDeletions)
318→            editor.putInt("$accountUuid.maxPushFolders", maxPushFolders)
319→            editor.putInt("$accountUuid.chipColor", chipColor)
320→            editor.putBoolean("$accountUuid.subscribedFoldersOnly", isSubscribedFoldersOnly)
321→            editor.putInt("$accountUuid.maximumPolledMessageAge", maximumPolledMessageAge)
322→            editor.putInt("$accountUuid.maximumAutoDownloadMessageSize", maximumAutoDownloadMessageSize)
323→            val messageFormatAuto = if (MessageFormat.AUTO == messageFormat) {
324→                // saving MessageFormat.AUTO as is to the database will cause downgrades to crash on
325→                // startup, so we save as MessageFormat.TEXT instead with a separate flag for auto.
326→                editor.putString("$accountUuid.messageFormat", MessageFormat.TEXT.name)
327→                true
328→            } else {
329→                editor.putString("$accountUuid.messageFormat", messageFormat.name)
330→                false

332→            editor.putBoolean("$accountUuid.messageFormatAuto", messageFormatAuto)
333→            editor.putBoolean("$accountUuid.messageReadReceipt", isMessageReadReceipt)
334→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.quoteStyle", quoteStyle.name)

336→            editor.putBoolean("$accountUuid.defaultQuotedTextShown", isDefaultQuotedTextShown)
337→            editor.putBoolean("$accountUuid.replyAfterQuote", isReplyAfterQuote)
338→            editor.putBoolean("$accountUuid.stripSignature", isStripSignature)
339→            editor.putLong("$accountUuid.cryptoKey", openPgpKey)
340→            editor.putBoolean("$accountUuid.openPgpHideSignOnly", isOpenPgpHideSignOnly)
341→            editor.putBoolean("$accountUuid.openPgpEncryptSubject", isOpenPgpEncryptSubject)
342→            editor.putBoolean("$accountUuid.openPgpEncryptAllDrafts", isOpenPgpEncryptAllDrafts)
343→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.openPgpProvider", openPgpProvider)
344→            editor.putBoolean("$accountUuid.autocryptMutualMode", autocryptPreferEncryptMutual)
345→            editor.putBoolean("$accountUuid.remoteSearchFullText", isRemoteSearchFullText)
346→            editor.putInt("$accountUuid.remoteSearchNumResults", remoteSearchNumResults)
347→            editor.putBoolean("$accountUuid.uploadSentMessages", isUploadSentMessages)
348→            editor.putBoolean("$accountUuid.markMessageAsReadOnView", isMarkMessageAsReadOnView)
349→            editor.putBoolean("$accountUuid.markMessageAsReadOnDelete", isMarkMessageAsReadOnDelete)
350→            editor.putBoolean("$accountUuid.alwaysShowCcBcc", isAlwaysShowCcBcc)
351→
352→            editor.putBoolean("$accountUuid.vibrate", notificationSettings.vibration.isEnabled)
353→            editor.putInt("$accountUuid.vibratePattern", notificationSettings.vibration.pattern.serialize())
354→            editor.putInt("$accountUuid.vibrateTimes", notificationSettings.vibration.repeatCount)
355→            editor.putBoolean("$accountUuid.ring", notificationSettings.isRingEnabled)
356→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.ringtone", notificationSettings.ringtone)
357→            editor.putString("$accountUuid.notificationLight", notificationSettings.light.name)
358→            editor.putLong("$accountUuid.lastSyncTime", lastSyncTime)
359→            editor.putLong("$accountUuid.lastFolderListRefreshTime", lastFolderListRefreshTime)
360→            editor.putBoolean("$accountUuid.isFinishedSetup", isFinishedSetup)
361→            editor.putBoolean("$accountUuid.useCompression", useCompression)
362→            editor.putBoolean("$accountUuid.sendClientInfo", isSendClientInfoEnabled)
363→            editor.putBoolean("$accountUuid.migrateToOAuth", shouldMigrateToOAuth)
364→        }
365→
366→        saveIdentities(account, storage, editor)
367→    }

369→    @Synchronized
370→    fun delete(editor: StorageEditor, storage: Storage, account: Account) {
371→        val accountUuid = account.uuid
372→
373→        // Get the list of account UUIDs
374→        val uuids =
375→            storage.getString("accountUuids", "").split(",".toRegex()).dropLastWhile { it.isEmpty() }.toTypedArray()
376→
377→        // Create a list of all account UUIDs excluding this account
378→        val newUuids = ArrayList<String>(uuids.size)
379→        for (uuid in uuids) {
380→            if (uuid != accountUuid) {
381→                newUuids.add(uuid)
382→            }
383→        }
384→
385→        // Only change the 'accountUuids' value if this account's UUID was listed before
386→        if (newUuids.size < uuids.size) {
387→            val accountUuids = Utility.combine(newUuids.toTypedArray(), ',')
388→            editor.putString("accountUuids", accountUuids)
389→        }
390→
391→        editor.remove("$accountUuid.$INCOMING_SERVER_SETTINGS_KEY")
392→        editor.remove("$accountUuid.$OUTGOING_SERVER_SETTINGS_KEY")
393→        editor.remove("$accountUuid.oAuthState")

486→    @Synchronized
487→    private fun saveIdentities(account: Account, storage: Storage, editor: StorageEditor) {
488→        deleteIdentities(account, storage, editor)
489→        var ident = 0
490→
491→        with(account) {
492→            for (identity in identities) {
493→                editor.putString("$uuid.$IDENTITY_NAME_KEY.$ident", identity.name)
494→                editor.putString("$uuid.$IDENTITY_EMAIL_KEY.$ident", identity.email)
495→                editor.putBoolean("$uuid.signatureUse.$ident", identity.signatureUse)
496→                editor.putString("$uuid.signature.$ident", identity.signature)
497→                editor.putString("$uuid.$IDENTITY_DESCRIPTION_KEY.$ident", identity.description)
498→                editor.putString("$uuid.replyTo.$ident", identity.replyTo)
499→                ident++
500→            }
501→        }
502→    }
503→
504→    @Synchronized
505→    private fun deleteIdentities(account: Account, storage: Storage, editor: StorageEditor) {
506→        val accountUuid = account.uuid
507→
508→        var identityIndex = 0
509→        var gotOne: Boolean
510→        do {
511→            gotOne = false
512→            val email = storage.getString("$accountUuid.$IDENTITY_EMAIL_KEY.$identityIndex", null)
513→            if (email != null) {
514→                editor.remove("$accountUuid.$IDENTITY_NAME_KEY.$identityIndex")
515→                editor.remove("$accountUuid.$IDENTITY_EMAIL_KEY.$identityIndex")
516→                editor.remove("$accountUuid.signatureUse.$identityIndex")
517→                editor.remove("$accountUuid.signature.$identityIndex")
518→                editor.remove("$accountUuid.$IDENTITY_DESCRIPTION_KEY.$identityIndex")
519→                editor.remove("$accountUuid.replyTo.$identityIndex")
520→                gotOne = true
521→            }
522→            identityIndex++
523→        } while (gotOne)
524→    }
525→
526→    fun move(editor: StorageEditor, account: Account, storage: Storage, newPosition: Int) {
527→        val accountUuids = storage.getString("accountUuids", "").split(",").filter { it.isNotEmpty() }
528→        val oldPosition = accountUuids.indexOf(account.uuid)
529→        if (oldPosition == -1 || oldPosition == newPosition) return
530→
531→        val newAccountUuidsString = accountUuids.toMutableList()
532→            .apply {
533→                removeAt(oldPosition)
534→                add(newPosition, account.uuid)
535→            }
536→            .joinToString(separator = ",")
537→
538→        editor.putString("accountUuids", newAccountUuidsString)
539→    }
540→
541→    private fun <T : Enum<T>> getEnumStringPref(storage: Storage, key: String, defaultEnum: T): T {
542→        val stringPref = storage.getString(key, null)
543→
544→        return if (stringPref == null) {
545→            defaultEnum
546→        } else {
547→            try {
548→                java.lang.Enum.valueOf<T>(defaultEnum.declaringJavaClass, stringPref)
549→            } catch (ex: IllegalArgumentException) {
550→                Timber.w(
551→                    ex,
552→                    "Unable to convert preference key [%s] value [%s] to enum of type %s",
553→                    key,
554→                    stringPref,
555→                    defaultEnum.declaringJavaClass,
556→                )
557→
558→                defaultEnum
559→            }
560→        }
561→    }
